mapper.select: SELECT log.year AS year, count(log.year) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.use_time, 1, 4) AS year FROM xeus.mt_aces_log log WHERE log.usr_id IS NOT NULL ) log GROUP BY log.year ORDER BY log.year

SELECT log.month AS month, count(log.month) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.use_time, 5, 2) AS month FROM xeus.mt_aces_log log
log.usr_id IS NOT NULL
AND log.use_time LIKE #{year}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.month ORDER BY log.month

SELECT log.day AS day, count(log.day) AS count FROM ( SELECT substring(log.use_time, 7, 2) AS day FROM xeus.mt_aces_log log
log.usr_id IS NOT NULL
AND log.use_time LIKE #{year}||'%'
AND log.use_time LIKE '____'||#{month}||'%'
) log GROUP BY log.day ORDER BY log.day
